name: Science Bar Hopping
overview: Science Bar Hopping is a federal popular science festival, during which more than 40 scientists give free lectures in city bars. In one evening, you can learn how to edit genes, launch spaceships, and study viruses. And at the same time — to meet interesting people and have a good time. The organizers of the festival are the Foundation for Infrastructure and Educational Programs (RUSNANO Group) and the St. Petersburg media company "Paper".
